```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement disaster recovery plan and procedures"
---
# Disaster Recovery
## Task
Design and implement disaster recovery procedures.
## Requirements
1. Define RPO (Recovery Point Objective) and RTO (Recovery Time Objective). 2. Implement automated backups.
3. Set up cross-region replication. 4. Create and test recovery runbooks.
5. Conduct DR drills quarterly.
## Constraints
- RPO < 1 hour. RTO < 4 hours. Test recovery monthly. Document all procedures.
## Success Criteria
- RPO/RTO met. Recovery tested. Runbooks validated. DR drills conducted.
```
